difficulty.title: Select Difficulty
difficulty.0.name: Normal
difficulty.0.info.name: Normal
difficulty.0.info.description:
No difficulty modifiers.

Complete a run on the previously unlocked difficulty to unlock the next difficulty level.
difficulty.1.name: Relentless
difficulty.1.description:
+ Earn +10% total run completion gold.
- Enemy Starting Level +2
- At the start of the turn, enemies gain 1 Strength and 1 Fortify.
difficulty.2.name: Hardened
difficulty.2.description:
+ Earn +20% total run completion gold.
- Enemy Starting Level +4
- Whenever an enemy takes damage for the first time each turn, they gain 1 Protection.
- All lower negative difficulty effects apply.
difficulty.3.name: Swift
difficulty.3.description:
+ Earn +30% total run completion gold.
- Enemy Starting Level +6
- At the start of the turn, enemies gain 1 Haste.
- Starting bonuses are disabled.
- All lower negative difficulty effects apply.
difficulty.4.name: Punishing
difficulty.4.description:
+ Earn +40% total run completion gold.
- Enemy Starting Level +8
- All lower negative difficulty effects apply.
difficulty.5.name: Hostile
difficulty.5.description:
+ Earn +50% total run completion gold.
- Enemy Starting Level +10
- Shop items are 50% more expensive.
- All lower negative difficulty effects apply.
